text:
### Instruction:
You are a smart home routine analyzer. Given the following device event log for a single day, identify any recurring routines present. List each routine with its name, the devices involved, and the typical times.

### Input:
Day: Tuesday 2024-01-02
Events:
- 06:28 coffee_maker ON
- 06:28 bathroom_light ON
- 06:48 bathroom_light OFF
- 06:52 kitchen_light ON
- 07:01 coffee_maker OFF
- 07:04 living_room_light ON
- 07:10 kitchen_light OFF
- 08:14 living_room_light OFF
- 10:47 living_room_light ON
- 11:35 living_room_light OFF
- 14:34 washing_machine ON
- 14:52 washing_machine OFF
- 17:44 kitchen_light ON
- 18:12 kitchen_light OFF
- 18:32 living_room_light ON
- 19:05 tv ON
- 21:06 tv OFF
- 21:31 living_room_light OFF
- 21:58 bedroom_light ON
- 22:56 bedroom_light OFF

### Response:
Routine detected: evening_routine
- bedroom_light: ON ~21:58, duration ~57 min
- living_room_light: ON ~18:32, duration ~178 min
- tv: ON ~19:05, duration ~121 min
Routine detected: morning_routine
- bathroom_light: ON ~06:28, duration ~19 min
- coffee_maker: ON ~06:28, duration ~33 min
- kitchen_light: ON ~06:52, duration ~18 min
- living_room_light: ON ~07:04, duration ~70 min
Irregular event detected: living_room_light at 10:47
Irregular event detected: washing_machine at 14:34
Irregular event detected: kitchen_light at 17:44
